/**
 * User.c
 * This file has been autogenerated using quicktype https://github.com/quicktype/quicktype - DO NOT EDIT
 * This file depends of https://github.com/DaveGamble/cJSON, https://github.com/joelguittet/c-list and https://github.com/joelguittet/c-hashtable
 * To parse json data from json string use the following: struct <type> * data = cJSON_Parse<type>(<string>);
 * To get json data from cJSON object use the following: struct <type> * data = cJSON_Get<type>Value(<cjson>);
 * To get cJSON object from json data use the following: cJSON * cjson = cJSON_Create<type>(<data>);
 * To print json string from json data use the following: char * string = cJSON_Print<type>(<data>);
 * To delete json data use the following: cJSON_Delete<type>(<data>);
 */

#ifndef __USER_C__
#define __USER_C__

#ifdef __cplusplus
extern "C" {
#endif

#include <stdint.h>
#include <stdbool.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>
#include <cJSON.h>
#include <hashtable.h>
#include <list.h>

#ifndef cJSON_Bool
#define cJSON_Bool (cJSON_True | cJSON_False)
#endif
#ifndef cJSON_Map
#define cJSON_Map (1 << 16)
#endif
#ifndef cJSON_Enum
#define cJSON_Enum (1 << 17)
#endif

struct Profile {
    int64_t age;
    bool active;
};

struct User {
    int64_t id;
    char * name;
    char * email;
    list_t * roles;
    struct Profile * profile;
};

struct Profile * cJSON_ParseProfile(const char * s);
struct Profile * cJSON_GetProfileValue(const cJSON * j);
cJSON * cJSON_CreateProfile(const struct Profile * x);
char * cJSON_PrintProfile(const struct Profile * x);
void cJSON_DeleteProfile(struct Profile * x);

struct User * cJSON_ParseUser(const char * s);
struct User * cJSON_GetUserValue(const cJSON * j);
cJSON * cJSON_CreateUser(const struct User * x);
char * cJSON_PrintUser(const struct User * x);
void cJSON_DeleteUser(struct User * x);

struct Profile * cJSON_ParseProfile(const char * s) {
    struct Profile * x = NULL;
    if (NULL != s) {
        cJSON * j = cJSON_Parse(s);
        if (NULL != j) {
            x = cJSON_GetProfileValue(j);
            cJSON_Delete(j);
        }
    }
    return x;
}

struct Profile * cJSON_GetProfileValue(const cJSON * j) {
    struct Profile * x = NULL;
    if (NULL != j) {
        if (NULL != (x = cJSON_malloc(sizeof(struct Profile)))) {
            memset(x, 0, sizeof(struct Profile));
            if (cJSON_HasObjectItem(j, "age")) {
                x->age = cJSON_GetNumberValue(cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(j, "age"));
            }
            if (cJSON_HasObjectItem(j, "active")) {
                x->active = cJSON_IsTrue(cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(j, "active"));
            }
        }
    }
    return x;
}

cJSON * cJSON_CreateProfile(const struct Profile * x) {
    cJSON * j = NULL;
    if (NULL != x) {
        if (NULL != (j = cJSON_CreateObject())) {
            cJSON_AddNumberToObject(j, "age", x->age);
            cJSON_AddBoolToObject(j, "active", x->active);
        }
    }
    return j;
}

char * cJSON_PrintProfile(const struct Profile * x) {
    char * s = NULL;
    if (NULL != x) {
        cJSON * j = cJSON_CreateProfile(x);
        if (NULL != j) {
            s = cJSON_Print(j);
            cJSON_Delete(j);
        }
    }
    return s;
}

void cJSON_DeleteProfile(struct Profile * x) {
    if (NULL != x) {
        cJSON_free(x);
    }
}

struct User * cJSON_ParseUser(const char * s) {
    struct User * x = NULL;
    if (NULL != s) {
        cJSON * j = cJSON_Parse(s);
        if (NULL != j) {
            x = cJSON_GetUserValue(j);
            cJSON_Delete(j);
        }
    }
    return x;
}

struct User * cJSON_GetUserValue(const cJSON * j) {
    struct User * x = NULL;
    if (NULL != j) {
        if (NULL != (x = cJSON_malloc(sizeof(struct User)))) {
            memset(x, 0, sizeof(struct User));
            if (cJSON_HasObjectItem(j, "id")) {
                x->id = cJSON_GetNumberValue(cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(j, "id"));
            }
            if (cJSON_HasObjectItem(j, "name")) {
                x->name = strdup(cJSON_GetStringValue(cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(j, "name")));
            }
            else {
                if (NULL != (x->name = cJSON_malloc(sizeof(char)))) {
                    x->name[0] = '\0';
                }
            }
            if (cJSON_HasObjectItem(j, "email")) {
                x->email = strdup(cJSON_GetStringValue(cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(j, "email")));
            }
            else {
                if (NULL != (x->email = cJSON_malloc(sizeof(char)))) {
                    x->email[0] = '\0';
                }
            }
            if (cJSON_HasObjectItem(j, "roles")) {
                list_t * x1 = list_create(false, NULL);
                if (NULL != x1) {
                    cJSON * e1 = NULL;
                    cJSON * j1 = cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(j, "roles");
                    cJSON_ArrayForEach(e1, j1) {
                        list_add_tail(x1, strdup(cJSON_GetStringValue(e1)), sizeof(char *));
                    }
                    x->roles = x1;
                }
            }
            else {
                x->roles = list_create(false, NULL);
            }
            if (cJSON_HasObjectItem(j, "profile")) {
                x->profile = cJSON_GetProfileValue(cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(j, "profile"));
            }
        }
    }
    return x;
}

cJSON * cJSON_CreateUser(const struct User * x) {
    cJSON * j = NULL;
    if (NULL != x) {
        if (NULL != (j = cJSON_CreateObject())) {
            cJSON_AddNumberToObject(j, "id", x->id);
            if (NULL != x->name) {
                cJSON_AddStringToObject(j, "name", x->name);
            }
            else {
                cJSON_AddStringToObject(j, "name", "");
            }
            if (NULL != x->email) {
                cJSON_AddStringToObject(j, "email", x->email);
            }
            else {
                cJSON_AddStringToObject(j, "email", "");
            }
            if (NULL != x->roles) {
                cJSON * j1 = cJSON_AddArrayToObject(j, "roles");
                if (NULL != j1) {
                    char * x1 = list_get_head(x->roles);
                    while (NULL != x1) {
                        cJSON_AddItemToArray(j1, cJSON_CreateString(x1));
                        x1 = list_get_next(x->roles);
                    }
                }
            }
            cJSON_AddItemToObject(j, "profile", cJSON_CreateProfile(x->profile));
        }
    }
    return j;
}

char * cJSON_PrintUser(const struct User * x) {
    char * s = NULL;
    if (NULL != x) {
        cJSON * j = cJSON_CreateUser(x);
        if (NULL != j) {
            s = cJSON_Print(j);
            cJSON_Delete(j);
        }
    }
    return s;
}

void cJSON_DeleteUser(struct User * x) {
    if (NULL != x) {
        if (NULL != x->name) {
            cJSON_free(x->name);
        }
        if (NULL != x->email) {
            cJSON_free(x->email);
        }
        if (NULL != x->roles) {
            char * x1 = list_get_head(x->roles);
            while (NULL != x1) {
                cJSON_free(x1);
                x1 = list_get_next(x->roles);
            }
            list_release(x->roles);
        }
        if (NULL != x->profile) {
            cJSON_DeleteProfile(x->profile);
        }
        cJSON_free(x);
    }
}

#ifdef __cplusplus
}
#endif

#endif /* __USER_C__ */
